title: 涨粉策略 Audience Building Strategy
description: Systematic growth from 0 to monetization thresholds across all platforms

tasks.text: Commit to 5-7 videos/week posting cadence (non-negotiable for algo)
Reply to 50+ comments within 2 hours of each post (15-20% reach boost)
Cross-post adapted content: vertical for Douyin, 16:9 for Bilibili/YouTube
Identify 10 xiangqi creators to engage with (comment, share, collaborate)
Reach first milestone: 1K followers on each platform
Reach second milestone: 10K followers on primary platform
First collaboration with another xiangqi creator
Analyze top 10 performing videos — identify patterns, double down
